title: JEO - BetterEssentials
description: A boosted version of the Essential mod to make it better
body:
![Mini header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d3efb76a66eaa7501d00c40a0ab9a022e9b97a3.png)
An Optimalized version of the Essential Mod

Give a little tweak to your Essential Minecraft mod!
This modpack adds some more features and performance to make your Minecraft expirence better!

Mods - 3D skin layers - AppleSkin - Architectury API - BetterF3 - Cloth Config API - Clumps - Continuity - CreativeCore - Dynamic FPS - Essential Mod - Fabric API - Fabric Language Kotlin - Forge Config API Port - ImmediatlyFast - Indium - Iris Shaders - Jade - LambDynamicLights - Lithium - Mod Menu - Model gap fix - Modernfix - Not Enough Animations - Reese's Sodium Options - Sodium - Sodium Extra - Text Placeholder Api - Xareo's Minimap - Xareo's World Map - YetAnotherConfigLib - Your Options Shall Be Recpected - Zommify - Entity Model Features - Entity Texture Features

## You can have Essentials but not as fast as now! Check out older versions on our github repo: [Click Here](https://github.com/BernieDevStudio/JEO_BetterEssential_old)
